passages.name: OutsideSetup
passages.subtitle: Far above the city, Helio-9 glows like a machine at the center of everything.

passages.name: OpenWrongDoor
passages.subtitle: Through smoke and furnace glow, rigid figures force human-like shapes forward.

passages.name: WrongDoorSound
passages.subtitle: Violent banging and muffled screams erupt from behind a sealed door.

passages.name: WalkAwayToD
passages.subtitle: Maya tears herself away, her pulse hammering as the screams fall behind.

passages.name: EndingChoice
passages.subtitle: Stay silent and disappear, or run before the system closes in.

passages.name: DoorSlamsShut
passages.subtitle: White smoke swallows the chamber. The heavy door slams shut behind her.

passages.name: ChamberReveal
passages.subtitle: A furnace burns at its core — whatever powers Helio-9, it was never just data.

passages.name: Ending_SecurityBreach
passages.subtitle: Maya runs… The chamber answers faster.

passages.name: Ending_QuietCaught
passages.subtitle: A red light fixes in place. She's been found.
